setPassword.title: Set Your Password
setPassword.helper: This is your first login. Please set a secure password.

resetPassword.title: Forgot Password
resetPassword.helper: Enter your email address to reset your password.
resetPassword.requestSuccess: If the email exists, a reset link has been sent.
resetPassword.confirmSuccess: Password reset successfully. Please sign in.

error.invalidToken: The reset link is invalid, expired, or has already been used.
error.noToken: No reset token provided. Please use the link sent to you.

error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
error.password-already-set: Password has already been set. Use sign in.
error.invalid-reset-token: The reset link is invalid or expired.
